name: lmti-atlas
description: A local-first project mind layer for AI coding agents.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/types packages/graph packages/privacy packages/migration packages/memory packages/security packages/tools packages/agents packages/context packages/compiler packages/kernel packages/cognition packages/world-model packages/runtime packages/cli
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/types packages/graph packages/privacy packages/migration packages/memory packages/security packages/tools packages/agents packages/context packages/compiler packages/kernel packages/cognition packages/world-model packages/runtime packages/cli
